mapper.select: SELECT v.*, p.name as pet_name FROM pet_vaccine_record v LEFT JOIN pet_profile p ON v.pet_id = p.id WHERE v.pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY v.vaccine_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_vaccine_record (pet_id, inventory_id, vaccine_name, vaccine_date, next_date, operator_name, remark) VALUES (#{petId}, #{inventoryId}, #{vaccineName}, #{vaccineDate}, #{nextDate}, #{operatorName}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT v.*, p.name as pet_name, p.user_id FROM pet_vaccine_record v LEFT JOIN pet_profile p ON v.pet_id = p.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND v.next_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY v.next_date ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet_vaccine_record v INNER JOIN pet_profile p ON v.pet_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 1
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR v.vaccine_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pet_id) FROM pet_vaccine_record v JOIN pet_profile p ON v.pet_id = p.id WHERE v.next_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND p.status = 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT v.pet_id) FROM pet_vaccine_record v INNER JOIN pet_profile p ON v.pet_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 1
